formDescription: This is the Introduction step of the BC Water Permit Application. On this page/step, you can choose to apply with your BCeID (a secure BC government login) or without BCeID. Using BCeID allows you to save your progress and access your application later. If you do not have a BCeID, you can still proceed without one.

ApplyWithYourBCeID.title: Apply with your BCeID
ApplyWithYourBCeID.description: use this button to proceed with applicant's BCeID Login account

ApplyWithoutBCeID.title: Apply without BCeID
ApplyWithoutBCeID.description: use this button to proceed WITHOUT BCeID Login
